text: Fixing a status-correctness bug client-side (normalizeFormData) is NOT sufficient when there is a separate backend API code path (buildDashboardSummary) that reads the same field from the database independently. Both paths must apply the same downgrade logic. Always trace ALL code paths that read a field — frontend form normalization and backend API summarization are completely separate consumers of the same database value.
issue: Dashboard showed green (completed) for EC even though required fields were empty. Fix in normalizeFormData() protected the form but not the dashboard API endpoint.
